_authoring_notes: Phase 4b-hub Section 5 — Memberships soft CTA. Inline pill on white bg.

Per Jonathan's locked decision (2026-04-28 PM): the Communities hub serves Step 2 of the audience flow (community identification). The natural next-step is Step 3 (Five Star Alliance) and Step 4 (specialty memberships). This CTA pulls readers into the Memberships hub — which is where the FSI Alliance funnel lives.
Visual pattern matches Memberships hub Section 4 'Not sure where you fit?' inline pill — visual consistency across the two hubs reinforces architectural symmetry.
Copy: 'Want to shape your industry? Explore our Memberships to lend your voice to change that matters.' (Jonathan-provided).
Routes to /memberships/ — the Memberships hub which presents Five Star Alliance + 6 specialty memberships.
